Explanation: Masjid al-Haram in Mecca was completed long before 1990 and has a capacity exceeding two million worshippers, with an area over 400,000 square meters [14065]. It is located within walking distance of the Masjid al-Taneem, which was built after 1720, and the Ajyad Hospital, established after 1930, both in Mecca. This satisfies all the criteria: completion date, capacity, area, proximity to another mosque built after 1720, and proximity to a hospital established after 1930.
Exact Answer: Masjid al-Haram, Mecca, Saudi Arabia
Confidence: 95%
